basis: NUTM1 RNA is normally silent in adult tissues; ectopic expression in a squamous or midline-like carcinoma is a strong NUT-rearrangement surrogate
confirmatory_tests: NUTM1 fusion calling; NUT IHC; FISH; clinical pathology review
caveat: Hypothesis only from gene-level RNA; fusion/IHC/FISH is needed before diagnosis or treatment selection

basis: TBXT/brachyury expression is a defining notochord-lineage signal and diagnostic marker for chordoma
confirmatory_tests: Brachyury IHC; anatomic/pathology review; chordoma-focused molecular/pathology confirmation
caveat: RNA-only testing prompt; TBXT can occur outside chordoma and should not override sarcoma-like context without site/pathology support

basis: NR4A3 overexpression is driven by acinic-cell-carcinoma rearrangements and is highly sensitive/specific among salivary mimics
confirmatory_tests: NR4A3 IHC; salivary pathology review; fusion/enhancer-hijack testing when available
caveat: Hypothesis only; requires salivary/head-neck clinical context and morphology

basis: MYB overexpression is common in adenoid cystic carcinoma and can reflect MYB-NFIB or related enhancer/fusion biology
confirmatory_tests: MYB IHC; MYB/MYBL1 rearrangement or fusion testing; salivary/lacrimal pathology review
caveat: Moderate-confidence hypothesis only; MYB is not specific in hematologic or other contexts

basis: CALCA/calcitonin expression with neuroendocrine support can flag medullary thyroid carcinoma hidden under a broader thyroid/endocrine RNA background
confirmatory_tests: Calcitonin/CEA/chromogranin IHC; serum calcitonin/CEA; RET/RAS testing; endocrine pathology review
caveat: Moderate-confidence hypothesis only; calcitonin/CALCA is not fully specific and neuroendocrine tumors can confound

basis: GIST = interstitial-cell-of-Cajal program; KIT and ANO1(DOG1) and lineage master TF ETV1 co-expressed at high level is GIST-specific - each marker alone is confounded (KIT in AML/SCLC/melanoma; ANO1 in LGFMS amplicon; PDGFRA/ETV1 pan-liposarcoma) so the co-expression GATE not individual levels discriminates; PRKCQ(PKC-theta) adds support; NE markers excluded to drop SCLC
confirmatory_tests: KIT/PDGFRA mutation sequencing; CD117(KIT)/DOG1(ANO1) IHC; clinical pathology
caveat: Co-expression gate from gene-level RNA only; confirm KIT/PDGFRA mutation and CD117/DOG1 IHC before diagnosis or kinase-inhibitor selection
